zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Dutton於1276年12月8日出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton31歲，母親Joan St. Pierre21歲。他於1312年與Joan de Holland在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他在英國爾哈爾頓被列為steward of halton。他去世於1326年在英國英格蘭爾達頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國爾達頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Dutton于1276年12月8日出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton31岁，母亲Joan St. Pierre21岁。他于1312年与Joan de Holland在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他在英国爾哈爾頓被列为steward of halton。他去世于1326年在英国英格兰爾達頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Dutton was born on 8 December 1276, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton, was 31 and his mother, Joan St. Pierre, was 21. He married Joan de Holland in 1312, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. His occupation is listed as steward of halton in Halton, Cheshire, England. He died in 1326, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dutton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Dutton est né le 8 décembre 1276, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan St. Pierre, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Holland en 1312, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est steward of halton à Halton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1326, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Dutton am 8. Dezember 1276 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton 31 und seine Mutter Joan St. Pierre 21. Er hat 1312 in Lancashire, England Joan de Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als steward of halton in Halton, Cheshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dutton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Dutton è nato il il 8 dicembre 1276 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan St. Pierre, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Holland nel 1312, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come steward of halton nel Halton, Cheshire, England. ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Duttonが1276年12月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Duttonは31歳，母Joan St. Pierreは21歳であった。1312年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan de Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。イギリスチェシュアイアハルトンでの職業はsteward of haltonと記録されている。彼は1326年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで50歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアダットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dutton(이)가 1276년 12월 8일 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan St. Pierre(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1312년 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan de Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 체실르 할턴에서 steward of halton이었다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 드턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Dutton nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1276, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan St. Pierre, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Holland em 1312, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como steward of halton em Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1326, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Dutton родился 8 декабря 1276 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan St. Pierre, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Holland в 1312 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.  Он работал по профессии steward of halton в местности хэлтон, чешир, Англия. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Joan de Holland en 1312, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era steward of halton en Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
